content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves clearly across the conversation. Starting from an abstract complaint ('I get super, super anxious very quickly') with no insight into causes (turn 1, turn 3: 'I don't know why that happens'), the client progressively names the surface mechanism (turn 5: 'I definitely don't like being seen... putting on a mask or running away'), touches the shame layer (turn 9: 'shame or beating myself up or groveling'), drops into a felt grief moment that the coach reads somatically (turns 17-19), and arrives at an embodied recognition by the end: when asked if there's any problem being seen right now, the client says 'No' (turn 23) and then spontaneously names what was actually being hidden — 'oh, my emotions... I'm not letting my emotions be seen' (turns 25, 27). This is a genuine shift from anxiety-about-being-seen to a felt experience of being seen without anxiety, plus a new self-knowledge that wasn't available at turn 1. The breakthrough condition (live experience of the anxiety dissolving when the deeper shame/emotion layer is welcomed) is met within the present moment.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 9, 17, 19, 23, 25, 27],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening presentation: abstract complaint about relationship anxiety."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client confirms anxiety is live but says 'I don't know why' — still at surface."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First movement: client names the mask/hiding pattern concretely."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Shame layer surfaces — client volunteers 'shame, beating myself up, groveling.'"},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client encounters the not-knowing of what's wrong — opens the inquiry rather than defending."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic shift — client drops in (coach reads it as grief)."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client articulates the chronic ignoring: 'I'm sitting on this all the time... I'm ignoring it.' New self-disclosure."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Direct evidence of shift: 'No' — not anxious about being seen in this moment."},
    {"turn": 25, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Spontaneous insight emerges: 'oh, my emotions.'"},
    {"turn": 27, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client lands the new framing in their own words: 'I'm not letting my emotions be seen.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "lets-go-there", "shame-as-disconnection"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Classic Joe arc compressed into 28 turns: anxiety → shame → grief → being-seen-without-problem → new self-knowledge. Shift is unambiguously in client turns."
}
